response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack software craftsman with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he lacks the core requirements for this specific role. He has less than a year of professional C++ experience, which falls far short of the mandatory 5-10 years, and possesses no relevant domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or traditional Investment Banking.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with strong architectural skills in microservices.
Solid background in CI/CD pipelines, test-driven development (TDD), and DevOps practices.
Prior exposure to the financial sector through his work at fintech startup RIDE Capital.
concerns: Falls drastically short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
Lacks required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Capital Markets.
No demonstrated experience with enterprise relational databases like SQL Server or Oracle.
